## Collections.ConvertingCollector type

A [collector](./ts-utils.collector.md) that converts items from a source representation to [ICollectible](./ts-utils.collections.icollectible.md) items with non-branded `string` key and `number` index.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type ConvertingCollector<TITEM extends ICollectible<string, number>, TSRC> = Collector<string, number, TITEM, TSRC>;
```
**References:** [ICollectible](./ts-utils.collections.icollectible.md)<!-- -->, [Collector](./ts-utils.collector.md)
